caption: In a formal presentation setting, a man in a grey blazer and brown trousers stands at a podium on a raised grey platform, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. To his right, another man in a dark suit sits in a black chair beside a small glass table. Behind them is a white wall featuring a repeating logo of a circle containing a crest and the text "INSTITUTE OF PEACE". A blue flag with a white emblem stands to the far left. In the foreground, the backs of an audience's heads are visible, facing the stage. Throughout the sequence, the speaker remains standing and speaking, shifting his posture and arm movements slightly, while the seated man remains still, observing the speaker. The lighting and camera angle remain constant, focusing on the stage and the interaction between the two men.
